description: Mobile-surface environment-health indicator. COMP-PARITY-3 added the health dot to the desktop cockpit header only; the mobile PWA (`src/mobile/`) is a separate surface and got no signal. Add a lightweight health indicator to the mobile shell consuming the same `GET /api/environment-health` endpoint (read-only). Surfaced by COMP-PARITY-3 (mobile was an explicit non-goal).
